item.name: Crested Goby
item.description:
This small freshwater fish takes its name from the comb-like dorsal fin that adorns its back.

[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: This wavekin was once the unwitting subject of taboo. Likening its thick, fleshy dorsal fin to a Hoobigo's comb, the Xbr'aal used to revile the fish, reminding them as it did of their bitter conflict with the Mamool Ja.
